theme.title: Object Pronouns in Context
theme.description: B1 practice with direct and indirect object pronouns, contrast, and more natural sentence patterns.

lesson.title: Lesson 8: Pronoun Position
lesson.instructions: Practice object pronoun placement with infinitives, gerunds, and commands.

exercises.prompt: I am going to explain it to you now because I do not want to repeat it later.
exercises.answer: Voy a explicartelo ahora porque no quiero repetirlo mas tarde.
exercises.answer_alt: Te lo voy a explicar ahora porque no quiero repetirlo mas tarde.
exercises.explanation: Both placements are correct and natural.

exercises.answer: We have been preparing it for her for weeks.
exercises.answer_alt: We have been getting it ready for her for weeks.
exercises.explanation: Attached pronouns also appear with gerunds.

exercises.prompt: Do not send it to me today. Send it to me tomorrow morning instead.
exercises.answer: No me lo mandes hoy. Mandamelo manana por la manana.
exercises.explanation: Negative commands place pronouns before the verb; affirmative commands attach them.

exercises.prompt: Quiero seguir leyendolo antes de comentartelo.
exercises.answer: I want to keep reading it before commenting on it to you.
exercises.answer_alt: I want to continue reading it before talking to you about it.
exercises.explanation: This sentence uses attached pronouns with two infinitives.

exercises.prompt: They were showing us the apartment when the agent suddenly offered it to another couple.
exercises.answer: Nos estaban ensenando el apartamento cuando el agente de repente se lo ofrecio a otra pareja.
exercises.explanation: The first clause uses an indirect object; the second uses 'se lo'.

exercises.prompt: Si vas a decirselo, hazlo con cuidado.
exercises.answer: If you are going to tell him, do it carefully.
exercises.answer_alt: If you are going to tell her, do it carefully.
exercises.explanation: The first clause attaches the pronouns to the infinitive; the second uses a direct object command.

exercises.prompt: I was trying to explain the change to them, but I was not explaining it well.
exercises.answer: Estaba intentando explicarles el cambio, pero no se lo estaba explicando bien.
exercises.answer_alt: Les estaba intentando explicar el cambio, pero no se lo estaba explicando bien.
exercises.explanation: This lesson focuses on keeping pronoun placement natural in longer clauses.

exercises.prompt: Devuelveselo en cuanto puedas, por favor.
exercises.answer: Give it back to him as soon as you can, please.
exercises.answer_alt: Give it back to her as soon as you can, please.
